title: Sponsor expands RBQM stack with centralized risk engine
summary: A top-20 sponsor reported a new central risk-scoring layer connecting EDC and CTMS to speed data issue detection.

title: Global study startup cycle reduced via startup workflow vendor
summary: Reported median startup reduction by 21% after applying standardized country package workflows.

title: New paper benchmarks LLM-assisted CSR authoring quality
summary: Peer-reviewed study compared reviewer effort and found lower revision rounds in controlled authoring workflows.
